title: cornicina nummularia
intro: Cornicina nummularia, also known as Coin Flower, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to North America, known for its coin-shaped flower heads and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. Cornicina nummularia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
